arts.ttl: “My expectation…” – Fabrizio Romano makes early Chelsea January transfer prediction
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided a major Chelsea transfer news update ahead of January as he has made it clear he expects Cesare Casadei to leave Stamford Bridge. The Blues signed Casadei as one of a number of young players for the future, but he’s not quite managed to make that step up into their first-team. arts.ttl: I regret leaving Chelsea to join Arsenal - I wanted to leave after three months
arts.sum: Willian has admitted that he wanted to leave Arsenal after just three months under Mikel Arteta. For me, it’s unfair to stay in a place that you don’t want to stay just because of the money.

arts.ttl: 'I was really upset': Pedro Neto shares the Chelsea match that left him so disappointed this season
arts.sum: 'I just want to enjoy my football.'

arts.ttl: Mykhailo Mudryk angers Chelsea fans with Usyk vs Fury actions
arts.sum: Mykhailo Mudryk has angered Chelsea fans further after he flew to Saudi Arabia to watch Tyson Fury’s fight against Oleksandr Usyk on Saturday. A statement from Chelsea on Tuesday read: "Chelsea Football Club can confirm the Football Association recently contacted our player Mykhailo Mudryk concerning an adverse finding in a routine urine test.
